name: context-engine
description: Context Game Engine — AI-first, file-authoritative, headless-complete game engine

spikes.description: Dependencies for the opt-in M0 de-risking spikes (CONTEXT_BUILD_SPIKES=ON); never part of the default build

shader-crosscompile.description: Native shader cross-compile toolchain for the opt-in CONTEXT_BUILD_SHADER_CROSSCOMPILE path (R-REND-005, issue #125); never part of the default build. glslang lowers GLSL->SPIR-V, spirv-tools validates/optimizes SPIR-V, spirv-cross reflects SPIR-V back to GLSL/MSL/HLSL.
